zh.title: 瑞波币/美元技术分析：弱势震荡下行趋势延续
zh.content:
当前瑞波币兑美元价格跌破1.10均线压制，运行于1.06附近低位区间，短期结构呈现弱势震荡下行特征。整体高点逐步下移，空头动能略占优势。

MACD指标维持负值并低于信号线，显示空头动能仍在释放。价格持续受20日均线1.098压制，反弹缺乏量能配合。短线修复力度有限。

下方关键支撑位于1.060附近，若失守可能进一步下探1.05区域。上方短期阻力关注1.075及1.10整数关口，突破前难以扭转趋势。

操作上建议以反弹做空为主思路，等待价格靠近1.075-1.10区间分批布局空单，同时严格设置止损于1.10上方。若跌破1.06可顺势追空但控制仓位。

en.title: Ripple vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
XRP/USD shows a bearish structure, with price at 1.06203 after a modest 24-hour decline. The market is hovering near its session low, indicating persistent selling pressure. Price remains below the 20-period SMA at 1.09810, reinforcing downside bias. Recent price action suggests lower highs and weak recovery attempts, pointing to consolidation within a broader corrective trend.

Momentum indicators further support weakness. MACD is negative at -0.0093, suggesting bearish momentum is active but not strongly accelerating. With RSI unavailable, price action and moving average positioning become more important. The flat-to-downward bias of price relative to the SMA20 indicates sellers maintain control. Any upward moves are likely corrective unless accompanied by strong volume.

Immediate support is at 1.0600, aligning closely with the current level and recent intraday low. A breakdown could expose 1.0500 and then the psychological 1.0000 level as deeper support zones. On the upside, resistance is at 1.0754, followed by 1.0981 SMA20. A further ceiling near 1.1200 may trigger renewed selling pressure.

Trading strategy favors a cautious bearish-to-neutral stance. Short positions may be considered on rallies toward 1.0750–1.0980 resistance, with rejection signals. Stop-loss above 1.1050 helps reduce upside risk. Alternatively, conservative traders may wait for a decisive break below 1.0600 before targeting 1.0500. Long positions are higher risk and should only be considered on strong reversal signals above the SMA20.
